# thoth_governance_cost_report (Data Source)

Reads governance cost report payload for token usage and spend.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `days` (Number) Optional reporting window in days.
- `rate` (Number) Optional model cost rate per 1K tokens.

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Cost report payload as JSON.
